items.title: Rockets' Isaiah Crawford: Scores 17 points with six stocks
items.author: CBS Sports

items.title: The Houston Rockets have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Isaiah Crawford, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Houston Rockets have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Isaiah Crawford, a league source told @spotrac.com.  

Crawford will now be a restricted free agent this summer.
